generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mom and a responsible citizen, I've always believed in being prepared. That's why I support strengthening our civil defense programs. It's not about fear—it's about duty. We owe it to our families and communities to ensure we're ready for any challenges. Our allies are stepping up, and so should we. #PreparednessMatters #DutyFirst
